channel.title: optocoupler on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in optocoupler on SoundsBrown

item.title: Optocouplers
item.description: Example circuits From the interwebs: Tested locally: 4N25 Test with circuit above suggests decay time of ~20ms after switching off. Input (J1) was square wave from LFO, output (J2) was to oscilloscope. Not great, but probably good enough for things like 1 PPS clock signals (200 BPM == 300 msec/beat). Note that https://hackaday.com/2018/05/09/optocouplers-defending-your-microcontroller-midi-and-a-hot-tip-for-speed/ suggests that adding some external circuitry can make the thing faster! H11L1 Should be equivalent to the PC900 mentioned in the MIDI spec.

item.title: Isolation
item.description: How do we make sure two interconnected modules don’t adversely affect one another? General Pass I/O connectors through diodes before they connect to the circuit. Use an opamp, see buffers. Digital signals Optocouplers. Dealing with differences in operating voltage Voltage dividers. Regulators.
